assessment.note: He names a concrete growth aspiration — owning a strategic bet with visible stakeholders — which is strong positive growth signal with mild energising signal.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Trade-offs ahead
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to own over the next six to twelve weeks?
new_queue.description: Forces a real prioritisation conversation around strategic ownership and trade-offs.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete next move.
